name: Tom T. Hall
abstract: Thomas Hall (May 25, 1936 – August 20, 2021), known professionally as Tom T. Hall and informally nicknamed "the Storyteller", was an American country music singer-songwriter and short-story author.

concerts.label: Tom T. Hall, with Johnny Rodriguez and Mike Seeger

works.t: The Year That Clayton Delaney Died

works_created.t: The World The Way I Want It
The Year That Clayton Delaney Died

about_quotes.speaker: Kristen Korb
about_quotes.evidence: I’m sure there is a good bit of Barbara Mandrell and Anne Murray and Tom T. Hall inside of me. You know? I mean just because that’s part of my upbringing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kristen Korb interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000
